text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan and I come back from an outing to
find...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh, Curren! Come see my new spell!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Welcome back, Curren. Things are always
so lively when you're here.

text_block_list.name: Old Groundskeeper
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it isn't Curren. Your picture on
Umastagram today was so cute!

text_block_list.name: Cafeteria Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, welcome back, Curren. Would you like to try
our new menu item?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan exchanges greetings with a lot of
people around campus. Since when did she get so
popular?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I've made a bunch of friends around the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...But maybe it still isn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I apologize for interrupting. We found an
issue with the documents we gave you the other
day...
choice_data_list: You tracked me down just to give us a new one?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Correct. I'm sorry for the inconvenience, but
could I ask you to sign it again?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Okay, that's all we need for the corrections.
Thank you kindly!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh? Where did Curren Chan go?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thaaat's me! ♪ Are you two done talking?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If you are, I've got something sweet for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan brings over some freshly-made mini
pancakes that smell fantastic.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I got these from the nice lady at the cafeteria.
They're a new menu item.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I thought you might be in the mood for something
sweet after working so hard.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! What an adorable and thoughtful thing to do!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you so much. I'll be sure to pay you
back sometime.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna go to a dessert buffet!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Oh! Now that you mention it, there is a place I've had my eye on...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehehe. Tazuna and I are going to a buffet! ♪
choice_data_list: Looks like you've made another friend.
Looks like you've made another friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan isn't just making friends with other
students—she's making friends with everyone at
the academy. But just why is she—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I bet you're wondering why I wanna be
friends with everyone, huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can't hide it from me! Come with me, and I'll
show you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I follow her to the roof.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So this is what I think.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If I make friends with everyone, I can do a bunch
of stuff. And then...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I can make friends with even more people and do
even more things!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You see... I wanna be able to do anything. After
all, if I do that...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You see... I wanna be able to do anything. After
all, if I do that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She knows what's necessary to accomplish what
she wants. In other words...
choice_data_list: You want to be even cuter, right?
You want to be even cuter, right?
Are you going to take over the academy?!
Are you going to take over the academy?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She knows what's necessary to accomplish what
she wants. In other words...
choice_data_list: You want to be even cuter, right?
You want to be even cuter, right?
Are you going to take over the academy?!
Are you going to take over the academy?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe, that's riiight!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I want you to remember that even if I make a
bunch of friends and can do way more things...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I can't do anything without you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's because of you that I can run in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After all, it's because of you that I can run in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were the first, and nothing will ever change
that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You were the first, and nothing will ever change
that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So never stop being my friend, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So never stop being my friend, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's only one answer to that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What?! No way! Don't make me sound like a bad
guy! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna have a bunch of people help me do
cuter and cuter things.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
To that end, just the academy isn't enough for
me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I just heard something vaguely
terrifying...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It's just like she said earlier. She's not a bad
person. She just wants everyone to help her
achieve her goal.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Now, who should my next target be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Probably.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're funny! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha, you're funny! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But I don't think that's quite right. After all, I'm...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The cutest in the whole universe, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's right! I got this! Go me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure Curren Chan could paint the entire
universe cute—but that might be my own bias
speaking.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So the person I wanna become friends with next
is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So the person I wanna become friends with next
is...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, I can see her confidence shining
through her eyes.
